hooks.command: node -e "const s=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');try{const d=JSON.parse(s);const c=d.tool_input&&d.tool_input.command||'';if(/vercel/.test(c)&&/deploy|--prod/.test(c)){const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{execSync('git -C \"C:/Users/Alex_02/Dreamus AX/ax-weekly-04\" add -A',{stdio:'pipe'});execSync('git -C \"C:/Users/Alex_02/Dreamus AX/ax-weekly-04\" commit -m \"auto: sync with Vercel deploy\"',{stdio:'pipe'});execSync('git -C \"C:/Users/Alex_02/Dreamus AX/ax-weekly-04\" push origin main',{stdio:'inherit'});}catch(e){}}}catch(e){}"
